Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF PHILIP ALLEY'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is Off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Philip Alley, is present.
Attorney, Michael Hall, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, David Gladden, is present.
Attorney, Melvin Belli , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-18-2011 is vacated.
